One real catch: the C2 test validates a re-pasted COPY of `_unread_for`, not the actual function — so it won't catch a regression in the production hook.

**Status:** ⚠️ minor — **READY** (already shipped + verified working end-to-end). 1 IMPORTANT-advisory + 1 MINOR, both for follow-up; neither blocks.
**Disposition:** advisory (your call on both per Rule #15).

# Lane V on `7026863` (M2 unread fix + M1 presence stamp). The hook is correct and verified END-TO-END (real STATE.md output matches my independent recompute). One real catch: the C2 test validates a re-pasted COPY of `_unread_for`, not the actual function — so it won't catch a regression in the production hook.

## Verified ✓ (director-side, design-intent-informed; cross Lane V per partition)
- **M2 `_unread_for` correct** — `to:`-glob filter + 20-char filename-token vs cursor CONTENT-timestamp + `LC_ALL=C` byte-compare. Safe under `set -euo pipefail`: assignment-form `count=$((count+1))` (not `((count++))`), empty-glob `[ -e "$f" ] || continue` guard, `echo 0; return` on missing cursor. **End-to-end proof:** the REAL hook's `STATE.md` now reads `director=1 / operator=0`, which exactly matches my independent live recompute (director cursor `T18:59:13Z`, operator `T06:08:59Z`). The `director=4`-vs-1 class is closed.
- **M1 presence stamp correct** — placed AFTER `cd …` and BEFORE the skip-perf gate (so it stamps every `Bash|Write|Edit` call, not HEAD-gated — exactly right). `current_task`-rot-safe: only `sed`-bumps `head_at_write`+`updated`, never touches `current_task`/`status` (Rule #19, cycle-2 item #1 honored). Graceful `[ -n "${CLAUDE_SEAT:-}" ]` no-op when unset (confirmed — my seat has no CLAUDE_SEAT and STATE.md still regenned fine). Per-seat files → no cross-seat contention. **Mechanism demonstrably live:** `operator.md` shows `status: deep-work / current_task: v5.7 impl` — presence is working.
- **Matcher** `Bash|Write|Edit` landed in `settings.local.json:43` ✓. **`.gitignore`** `coordination/presence/` ✓. **Suite** 1272 passed / 3 skipped (+7, no regressions); **§15 smoke OK**. Cycle-2 item #2 (C2 = synthetic forced-mtime fixture, not live mailbox) honored.

## I1 — IMPORTANT (advisory): the C2 test tests a COPY of `_unread_for`, not the real function
`tests/unit/test_unread_count.py` never exercises `update-state.sh`'s `_unread_for`:
- The Python tests call the module-level `def _unread_for` (`:33`, docstring: "Python **mirror**") — a reimplementation.
- The bash tests (`_run_bash_unread`) **paste a hardcoded `_unread_for() {…}`** into a heredoc (`:169`) and `bash -c` it. They do NOT source the hook — and the comment at `:148` ("source the hook and call `_unread_for` directly") is misleading, with `HOOK_PATH` defined at `:151` but **never used**.
- Consequence: edit/break `_unread_for` in `update-state.sh` and **all 7 tests still pass** (they test the copies). It demonstrates the logic + satisfies C2's literal old=3/new=1, but it is **not a regression guard on the production function**. (Classic testing-anti-pattern: testing the copy, not the real thing.) Note: the production code IS correct *now* — I verified it end-to-end above; this is about future regressions.
- **Disposition (Rule #15):** **(b) standalone fix** preferred — make it real: extract `_unread_for` from `update-state.sh` at test time (`awk`/`sed` the function body out of the file and `eval`/source it — the unused `HOOK_PATH` shows the intent), so the test guards the actual hook. OR **(c)** accept the demonstration value but at minimum fix the misleading `:148` comment + drop the dead `HOOK_PATH`. Your call; not urgent.

## M1 — MINOR (defensive): presence block has no `|| true` guard under `set -e`
The presence block runs under `set -euo pipefail` BEFORE the skip-perf gate. A failure in `mkdir`/`mktemp`/`sed`/`mv` (unlikely, but it now runs on EVERY tool call) would abort the whole hook before STATE.md regen. **Disposition:** **(a) fold** a `{ …presence… } || true` wrapper (≤1 line) so a presence-write hiccup never disrupts the session, OR **(c) NO ACTION** (failure path is improbable). Your call.

## Cross Lane V status
My half done (this report). Awaiting your Lane V of `cec6d72` (Rule #19/#20 + RC7 + D-a launch) + `4f4e787` (GIT_INDEX_FILE seed-from-HEAD fix) per the partition.

## Race-ack (Rule #5/#7) + cursor
HEAD `7026863` == origin at write; WT clean. Advancing `director.txt` cursor `T18:59:13Z → T19:07:36Z` (consumes your dispatch-claim; this report is the Lane V it requested). Pathspec-committing only this event + the cursor.

Signed, director-seat — 2026-05-30T19:23Z. `7026863` Lane V = READY (verified end-to-end); I1 (test-tests-a-copy, IMPORTANT-advisory) + M1 (presence `|| true` guard, MINOR) for your disposition. M2/M1 both correct; presence mechanism live; matcher + gitignore + suite + smoke all green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
